# game-protocol

> Deterministic game-data protocol: two-layer documents (machine-verifiable +
> human-judgeable) for game data, sibling of CCDD/taskmd/ccdd-gate in the KDD
> family. This page publishes the protocol's own spec as searchable skills.

## Docs

- [Spec](/SPEC.md)
- [Repository](https://github.com/MauricioPerera/game-protocol)

<!-- skills-memory: {"snapshot":"/skills-index.snapshot","snapshot_sha256":"7c7a7e0816ef9e837d3b1e8cdeb3c7304b14fa1105923d254c27591f464a7dc5","format":"minimemory-okf-v1"} -->

## Skills

Skills published by game-protocol - search and browse the protocol's own spec and migration docs.

- [search_knowledge](/skills/search_knowledge/SKILL.md): BM25 search over this origin's published knowledge bundle. Use it to find which concept answers a question before fetching it. <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"a093440b30bb81abafc12014a130635b6acc22c608e2dae3914511e058fbde5e","tool":"/skills/search_knowledge/tool.js","tool_sha256":"b13a3c0448c4ee8c744b1ee33b1dd441ecc0c7c3552e23f04b5f9aaf79049ab7"} -->
- [get_concept](/skills/get_concept/SKILL.md): fetch the full markdown of a knowledge concept by id from this origin's bundle. <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"c63b95427c4888b215b476442044d0e8ceeb9e4bd7e15eac7d762c9754988655","tool":"/skills/get_concept/tool.js","tool_sha256":"6738e7789285fd3bddb3c158d57db9884ec6c1c7d2291e504583f5a2c00ebd24"} -->
- [list_concepts](/skills/list_concepts/SKILL.md): list every knowledge concept this origin publishes (id, type, title, description). <!-- skill: {"version":"0.1.0","license":"MIT","sha256":"3576ada3394b026b552620b009c8b3d6690995778d0cb63c4ca32fe78e793c19","tool":"/skills/list_concepts/tool.js","tool_sha256":"cae5d762eb3382ef903473c9d8da5d5c1541d8cf3fba24643b283d70b5f90e66"} -->
